summary: Drawing/diagram tool with toolbar buttons including an eraser tool (button 7) that erases all diagram elements (icons, text, tools) and a free transform tool (button 8) that supports moving, resizing icons, and other diagram elements.

existing_features.title: Extend the eraser tool (button 7 in the toolbar, tool type 'eraser') in AttackPathCanvas.tsx so that it can erase all diagram element types: icons (DiagramIcon), text labels (TextLabel), freehand drawings (FreehandDrawing), lines/arrows (Line/Connection), and image elements (Image). When the eraser is active and a user clicks or drags over any of these elements, they should be removed from the diagram state.

Extend the free transform tool (button 8 in the toolbar, tool type 'freeTransform') in AttackPathCanvas.tsx to support selecting, moving, and resizing icon elements (DiagramIcon/AttackPathIcon) in the diagram. When the free transform tool is active, clicking an icon should show selection handles that allow the user to drag to move the icon and drag corner/edge handles to resize it, consistent with how images and text labels already support free transform.

new_feature_requests.summary: Eraser tool should erase all diagram elements including icons, text, and tools
Free transform tool should support moving and resizing icons in the diagram

projectName: Extend eraser tool to erase all elements and free transform tool to move/resize icons
